criteria.name: Thumb-stop cover
criteria.why: Huge 'IT ISN'T BUILT YET' over the Alaska relief plate with reticle and gold Polaris is a clean single-focal pattern interrupt; the 8-word overline supplies the specific claim. Held from 9-10 because the bone relief outline nearly disappears at 432px, so the hero line carries almost alone at thumb.

criteria.name: Story arc & swipe momentum
criteria.why: Genuine beats hook to honest close; the confidence meter (0% COMPUTED to MODEL TBD to SITES NAMED 1 to WATCH THE MILESTONES) is a real spine and the contact sheet reads as one composed sequence. S3/S4 and the S7 legend are mildly modular, keeping it off a 9.

criteria.name: Artwork craft & genuine detail
criteria.why: Flat/film-graded system IS argued in the dossier; execution is consistent and tasteful (OKLCH-style grade, grain, hairline coastline incl. Aleutians survives zoom, isotype 56/60 grid, parallel-projection ladder, assay chips, truth-code color). But the 10 descriptor also wants at least one slide with real depth used masterfully; the relief reads as a graded 2D map with a grid overlay, interiors largely empty graphite. Argued-flat lifts above 7 but the unrealized depth caps it.

criteria.name: Story-art fusion
criteria.why: Best dimension. Art encodes the numbers literally: 12 nodes / 1 gold Alaska, 56 lit / 4 dark, a ladder of 2 solid gold rungs vs 8 phantom-blue ghost rungs, a true-scaled $500K sliver, exactly 7 chips, exactly 1 gold pin, the 0% meter and un-run grid = the AI's unbuilt state. Gold=real / phantom-blue=promise is a genuine semantic system.

criteria.name: Alaska authenticity & local relevance
criteria.why: Named throughout: NSF, UAF, USGS, NANA (correctly a partner), Alaska Silver, Lee Ann Munk, Fairbanks coordinates, western-Alaska site, $500K state seed, the China-processing goal. Geography accurate, honestly labeled illustrative. A consequential local win told without boosterism.

criteria.name: Insight density & factual weight
criteria.why: Nearly every content slide adds a new verified specific, 25-50 words on dense slides, zero filler. S7 lighter breather and S9 synthesis are appropriate, keeping it off a 9.

criteria.name: Variety vs ledger
criteria.why: Fresh hero concept and novel honest confidence-meter continuity device with clean divergence on every required axis; but the Alaska-map-as-hero returns (No.1) and Archivo-variable display returns (No.2/No.5), recognizable reused subsystems, the textbook 7 descriptor.

criteria.name: Legibility & platform fitness
criteria.why: Floors met: 33px Manrope body, NN/09 counters on all nine, safe zones respected, vector PDF 3.28MB in-band with title, reads at 432px. Squeakers: dim S5 sub and body over relief on S4/S8 (scrimmed, legible).

criteria.name: Copy: voice & hook
criteria.why: Hook complete and sharp inside ~117 chars, caption ~570 chars within band, analytical position-taking voice, deck-summary line present, real debatable close, straight quotes, no dashes, grade 8-10.

criteria.name: Deliverable completeness
criteria.why: Post copy, exactly 3 niche hashtags, first-comment source block, deck-summary line, document title, vector PDF, 9 renders, thumbs and contact sheet all present and correct. Scored 8 (not 10) because the Gmail draft, run report, and live main-branch URL resolution are not verifiable from the scored artifacts.

one_sentence_fix: Give the Alaska relief plates genuine multiplane depth (real hillshade/atmospheric layering and interior texture) so the hero delivers the dimensional survey plate the storyboard argues for, instead of reading as a graded 2D map with a grid overlay.
honest_notes: Weights sum to 1.10, so 8.78 sits on a ~11 scale between No.5 (8.54) and No.4 (8.90); revision count 1 keeps the iteration-ladder threshold at 8.3 (0-2 band). No hard fail, no 6.9 cap. Honesty guardrails all held on-slide (NANA partner not owner, biological methods not biomining, only 7 named minerals, single illustrative pin with no Ambler/Pebble, $160M always conditional, $135M-to-$2B fenced as program-wide). The deck's real ceiling is artwork depth and hero/type variety, not honesty or story.
